metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_84
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Using GFP knock-in mice, the authors show that munc18-1 accumulates in boutons/nerve terminals and collocalizes with the vesicle cluster. In FRAP experiments, a significant fraction of the protein was found to be in the immobile fraction (40%), probably via binding to syntaxin (half of the immobile fraction). Experimental description: Cells: "Generation of Munc18-1-Venus knockin mice"
Knockin: " a genomic sequence 5' of, and including, exon 20 of the munc18-1 gene from 129/Sv embryonic stem (ES) cell DNA, was subcloned using PCR into pGEM-T Easy (Promega),"

Annotation against mouse is correct!
